name: inbound-ads
description: Inbound CPH's Google Ads suite covering the full client lifecycle — build new campaigns, optimize live accounts, and produce audits, changelogs and client-context docs — Danish-default and read-only against Google Ads except HITL-gated writes through the ads-writer agent.

inbound_root_folder_id.title: Inbound CPH Drive folder ID
inbound_root_folder_id.description: The Google Drive folder ID for the inbound-cph/ root folder where all client folders live. Defaults to the shared agency folder. Override only if you have a different mount.
